name: crucible
description: Codex-native RLVR harness for verifier-backed coding tasks and inspectable SFT/RLVR datasets.

interface.shortDescription: Turn repos into verifier-backed RLVR data
interface.longDescription: Use Crucible in Codex to generate bounded coding tasks, run attempts through verifiers, inspect reward evidence, curate teacher repairs, and export SFT/RLVR JSONL rows.
defaultPrompt: Use Crucible to inspect this repo for RLVR tasks
Run the Crucible demo harness and summarize reward evidence
Use Crucible to curate a verifier-backed teacher repair
